docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT HARRIS, RONALD ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
DECLARATION RE: LOST SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF THAKOR, B.D.

SETT CONF HELD.CASE SETTLED. STEVEN MACDONALD, JUDGE PRO TEM DAN MACDUFF, CLERK; HELEN SOREP-MATLEY, CSR. THE PARTIES AGREE: RESTITION OF PREMISES AT 1018 MISSION ST. #311, SAN FRANCISCO, STAYED UNTIL 9AM ON 9/12/2000. JUDGMENT FOR PLTF, AGAINST DEFT FOR $2,480.00, BUT IF DEFT VACATES AS NOTED ABOVE AND DOES NOT HARASS PLTF, THE JUDGMENT WILL BE FULLY SATISFIED WITHOUT PAYMENT OF THE MONEY. IF PLTF VACATES AS ABOVE, HE MAY MOVE, WITHOUT OPPOSITION BY PLTF, TO HAVE THE JUDGMENT SET ASIDE. EACH TO BEAR OWN ATTY FEES AND COSTS. PLTF PLTF'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE A JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT SERVED JUL-26-2000, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, RONALD

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF THAKOR, B.D. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR AUG-22-2000 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON AUG-28-2000 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
